records.question: Which drivers named Timothy Ackert are at least 35 years old, from Coventry, and belong to the Rep party?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
WHERE driver.home_city = 'Coventry' AND driver.party = 'Rep' AND driver.age >= 35 AND driver.name = 'Timothy Ackert'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT driver.Driver_ID
FROM driver
WHERE driver.Home_city = 'Coventry'
  AND driver.Party = 'Rep'
  AND driver.Age >= 35
  AND driver.Name = 'Timothy Ackert'

records.question: Which drivers named Douglas McCrory, who are at least 36 years old, live in Hartford, belong to the Dem party, and drive full-time school buses with exactly 8 years of experience?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
WHERE school_bus.years_working = 8 AND driver.age >= 36 AND driver.name = 'Douglas McCrory' AND school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND driver.home_city = 'Hartford' AND driver.party = 'Dem'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT driver.Driver_ID
FROM driver
WHERE driver.Age >= 36
  AND driver.Name = 'Douglas McCrory'
  AND driver.Home_city = 'Hartford'
  AND driver.Party = 'Dem'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM school_bus
    WHERE school_bus.Driver_ID = driver.Driver_ID
      AND school_bus.Years_Working = 8
      AND school_bus.If_full_time = 'T'
  )

records.question: Which drivers named Angel Acre are at most 42 years old and drive a school bus?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
WHERE driver.age <= 42 AND driver.name = 'Angel Acre'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id
FROM driver
WHERE driver.Age <= 42
  AND driver.Name = 'Angel Acre'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM school_bus
    WHERE school_bus.Driver_ID = driver.Driver_ID
  )

records.question: Which drivers aged at least 36, living in Hartford and affiliated with the Dem party, drive full-time school buses with no more than 8 years experience for Occidental College where the school type is Private and the location includes California?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
JOIN school ON school_bus.school_id = school.school_id
WHERE school.location LIKE '%California%' AND driver.age >= 36 AND school.type = 'Private' AND school.school = 'Occidental College' AND school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND driver.home_city = 'Hartford' AND driver.party = 'Dem' AND school_bus.years_working <= 8
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT driver.Driver_ID
FROM driver
WHERE driver.Age >= 36
  AND driver.Home_city = 'Hartford'
  AND driver.Party = 'Dem'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM school_bus
    WHERE school_bus.Driver_ID = driver.Driver_ID
      AND school_bus.If_full_time = 'T'
      AND school_bus.Years_Working <= 8
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM school
        WHERE school.School_ID = school_bus.School_ID
          AND school.Location LIKE '%California%'
          AND school.Type = 'Private'
          AND school.School = 'Occidental College'
      )
  )

records.question: Which drivers who are Democrats have exactly 10 years working with school buses that serve Kindergarten schools?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
JOIN school ON school_bus.school_id = school.school_id
WHERE school_bus.years_working = 10 AND school.grade = 'Kindergarten' AND driver.party = 'Dem'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT driver.Driver_ID
FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.Driver_ID = school_bus.Driver_ID
WHERE driver.Party = 'Dem'
  AND school_bus.Years_Working = 10
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM school
    WHERE school.School_ID = school_bus.School_ID
      AND school.Grade = 'Kindergarten'
  )

records.question: Which drivers operate school buses that are exactly full-time?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
JOIN school ON school_bus.school_id = school.school_id
WHERE school_bus.if_full_time = 'T'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT driver.Driver_ID
FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.Driver_ID = school_bus.Driver_ID
JOIN school ON school_bus.School_ID = school.School_ID
WHERE school_bus.If_full_time = 'T'

records.question: Which drivers aged at least 46 have been working exactly 3 years as full-time school bus drivers?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
WHERE school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND school_bus.years_working = 3 AND driver.age >= 46
records.pred_sql:
SELECT driver.Driver_ID
FROM driver
WHERE driver.Age >= 46
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM school_bus
    WHERE school_bus.Driver_ID = driver.Driver_ID
      AND school_bus.If_full_time = 'T'
      AND school_bus.Years_Working = 3
)
